title: nephrodium glanduligerum
intro: Nephrodium glanduligerum, also known as the Button Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The Button Fern has been used to treat various health issues, such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting healing. The herbal preparations of Nephrodium glanduligerum typically involve drying and processing the plant into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
